bundles.title: Severity-aware ledger helper
bundles.goal: Introduce unresolvedCriticalHighCount helper replacing unresolvedHighCount with full unit coverage.

tasks.title: Add unresolvedCriticalHighCount(ledger) counting severity ∈ {critical, high} with status ∈ {new, open} in src/lib/review-ledger.ts
Delete unresolvedHighCount helper and sweep all imports via TypeScript rename
Add unit tests with severity matrix fixture (HIGH-only, CRITICAL-only, mixed, LOW/MEDIUM only, empty)
Run tsc --noEmit to confirm no dangling references

bundles.title: Surface-event schema_version bump
bundles.goal: Add schema_version:2 to review-outcome payload contracts with legacy reader support.

tasks.title: Add schema_version:number field to apply_review_approved / design_review_approved / request_changes / block payload types
Add reader helper flagging legacy_actionable_count_basis:true when schema_version missing or <2
Extend surface-event-schema-drift.test.ts: new events carry schema_version:2; legacy fixtures flagged correctly

bundles.title: Orchestrator severity gate + schema emission
bundles.goal: Rewire apply/design review orchestrators to gate handoff state on unresolvedCriticalHighCount and emit schema_version:2.

tasks.title: Update resultFromLedger in specflow-review-apply.ts to derive state from unresolvedCriticalHighCount>0
Update autofix-loop tail in specflow-review-apply.ts to compute loop_no_findings/loop_with_findings from the new helper
Mirror both changes in specflow-review-design.ts
Populate schema_version:2 on all emitted review-outcome surface events
Confirm decision string is surfaced in UI but not consulted by handoff computation

bundles.title: Current-phase renderer + ledger status alignment
bundles.goal: Update renderCurrentPhase/renderCurrentPhaseToStore and ledger status derivation to use the severity-aware helper.

tasks.title: Add criticalHigh=unresolvedCriticalHighCount(ledger) in renderCurrentPhase and drive nextAction off criticalHigh>0
Apply same change to renderCurrentPhaseToStore for both apply and design kinds
Rename Open High Findings line to Open High/Critical Findings with breakdown; retain Actionable Findings line
Update ledgerStatus derivation so has_open_high covers critical+high via the new helper (value string unchanged)

bundles.title: Slash-command guide bodies
bundles.goal: Regenerate review_apply/review_design/approve guides to surface approve-last with severity summary and accepted-risk warning.

tasks.title: Update State-to-Option Mapping in review_apply body: fix, reject, then Approve (last) with severity-summary suffix
Mirror mapping in review_design body: fix, reject, then Apply (last) with severity-summary suffix
Add inline accepted-risk warning shown when approve/apply selected in _with_findings states
Update _no_findings header message to clarify all HIGH+ resolved (LOW/MEDIUM may remain)
Update specflow.approve.md Quality Gate copy to describe critical+high threshold
Regenerate global/commands/*.md via the specflow-generate-commands pipeline

bundles.title: Tests and severity-matrix fixtures
bundles.goal: Add fixtures and tests covering severity-aware gating across orchestrators, renderer, and generated guides.

tasks.title: Add fixtures: HIGH=0/LOW=N, HIGH=0/MEDIUM=M, HIGH=0/CRITICAL=K, HIGH≥1/LOW=N
Refocus existing actionable_count→state tests onto actionableCount as a pure function
Extend specflow-run.test.ts orchestrator cases to confirm critical blocks and HIGH blocks but LOW/MEDIUM do not
